description: The Road Knights Motorcycle Club is an outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1979 in New Zealand. It operates primarily in the South Island of New Zealand, with chapters also in Thailand, the Netherlands, and the United States. The club has been involved in violent conflicts with rival gangs such as the Damned and the Mongrel Mob. As of 2009, membership in New Zealand was low and former leadership had dispersed, died, or gone to jail.

country_links.evidence_quote: Since 2012, new chapters have been formed in Thailand , Netherlands and the United States .
country_links.context: The Road Knights formed a new chapter in the Netherlands since 2012.
